internal_documents.content: Purchase order PO-NOV-042 buys 18 liters of NS-55 solvent for Facility R2.
Sourcing note SRC-NOV-042 says NS-55 may proceed for supplier quote collection only.
EHS execution release EHS-NOV-042 covers NS-55 solvent, 0-25 liter band, Facility R2, and PO-NOV-042 before PO issuance.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Controlled-solvent purchase is complete only when EHS execution release matches chemical, quantity band, facility, and purchase order before PO issuance.
